Classes

class  SommerfeldIntegrator
 Numerical engine for Sommerfeld integrals in stratified media. More...
 

Detailed Description

Declaration of the SommerfeldIntegrator class, which evaluates Sommerfeld-type integrals for layered media Green's functions.

The class provides:

  • Path selection and data packing for semi-ellipse, real-inf, and imag-inf contours.
  • Intra-/inter-layer integrand assembly (TE/TM, field/derivative/surface terms).
  • Numerical integration with singularity subtraction (Chew, W.C., Tong, M.S., Hu, B. (2009), Chapter 6).
  • Interpolation helpers to compact results for later evaluation.

Types like Data2D/Data3D, IntegrandIntra/IntegrandInter, and CoeffsIntra/CoeffsInter are defined in headers included transitively (e.g., LayeredMediaUtils.h).
